members.name: ActionDown
members.summary: The action to trigger when the joystick is moved down.

members.name: ActionLeft
members.summary: The action to trigger when the joystick is moved left.

members.name: ActionRight
members.summary: The action to trigger when the joystick is moved right.

members.name: ActionUp
members.summary: The action to trigger when the joystick is moved up.

members.name: ClampzoneRatio
members.summary: The multiplier applied to the joystick's radius that defines the clamp zone. This zone limits how far the joystick tip can move from its center before being clamped. A value of [code]1.0[/code] means the tip can move up to the edge of the joystick's visual size. In [constant JOYSTICK_FOLLOWING] mode, this radius also determines how far the finger can move before the joystick base starts following the touch input.

members.name: DeadzoneRatio
members.summary: The ratio of the joystick size that defines the joystick deadzone. The joystick tip must move beyond this ratio before being considered active. This deadzone is applied before triggering input actions and affects the joystick's input vector and all related signals. Note that input actions may also define their own deadzones in the InputMap. If both are set, the joystick deadzone is applied first, followed by the action's deadzone. By default, this value is [code]0.0[/code], meaning the joystick does not apply its own deadzone and relies entirely on the InputMap action deadzones.

members.name: InitialOffsetRatio
members.summary: The initial position of the joystick as a ratio of the control's size. [code](0, 0)[/code] is top-left and [code](1, 1)[/code] is bottom-right.

members.name: JoystickSize
members.summary: The size of the joystick in pixels.

members.name: TipSize
members.summary: The size of the joystick tip in pixels.

signals.name: FlickCanceled
signals.summary: Emitted when the tip enters the deadzone after being outside of it.

signals.name: Flicked
signals.summary: Emitted when the tip moved outside the deadzone and the joystick is released. The [param input_vector] contains the last input direction and strength before release. Its length is between [code]0.0[/code] and [code]1.0[/code].

signals.name: Pressed
signals.summary: Emitted when the joystick is pressed.

signals.name: Released
signals.summary: Emitted when the joystick is released. The [param input_vector] is the final input direction and strength, with a length between [code]0.0[/code] and [code]1.0[/code].

signals.name: Tapped
signals.summary: Emitted when the joystick is released without moving the tip.

values.name: JOYSTICK_DYNAMIC
values.summary: The joystick is moved to the initial touch position as long as it's within the joystick's bounds. It moves back to its original position when released.

values.name: JOYSTICK_FOLLOWING
values.summary: The joystick is moved to the initial touch position as long as it's within the joystick's bounds. It will follow the touch input if it goes outside the joystick's range. It moves back to its original position when released.

values.name: VISIBILITY_WHEN_TOUCHED
values.summary: The joystick is only visible when being touched.

constants.name: JOYSTICK_DYNAMIC
constants.summary: The joystick is moved to the initial touch position as long as it's within the joystick's bounds. It moves back to its original position when released.

constants.name: JOYSTICK_FOLLOWING
constants.summary: The joystick is moved to the initial touch position as long as it's within the joystick's bounds. It will follow the touch input if it goes outside the joystick's range. It moves back to its original position when released.

constants.name: VISIBILITY_WHEN_TOUCHED
constants.summary: The joystick is only visible when being touched.
